answer:
Cherish the moments where you nurture yourself, much like tending to a small sprout in need of care. Just as a gardener provides the right amount of sunlight and water to help a seedling flourish, so too should you tend to your own emotional needs. Embrace the support you receive, knowing that every seed of kindness planted has the potential to grow into something beautiful. Remember, nurturing your own growth is essential, just like cultivating a garden—it takes time, patience, and love. Lean on your roots, and watch your life blossom.
